title: DeleteButton
description: A simple mod that adds a button to quickly remove server from server list
body:
### DeleteButton
_Useful mod to fast remove server from multiplayer screen_\
**Want to change icon?** - Just press SHIFT or CTRL and click on it

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2144a2ccef018be9575b8e9309ff5646676323d3.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cf47d6a3cee2bb275376d3d0de8b346a921730d.png)
